g.text: warden — composition: many plugins → one governed Warden
Plugins you write (each: Manifest + contribute + optional assemble)
Registry — open, type-keyed (a point = ANY Send+Sync trait)
How MANY providers become ONE (the safe default is baked in)

text.tspan: an AUDITABLE fact of how it's configured
any new trait a plugin adds;
into the single values the kernel wants
any Deny wins; else any Escalate; else Allow
